productDisplayName: ADIDAS Originals Men Vespa PK LO Brown Casual Shoes
description: With a classic leather build and featuring a Vespa monogram graphic on the outsole, the Vespa PK Lo from adidas originals is a vintage shoe with preppy-inspired details. UpperSuede and nubuck leather upper with patented adidas 3-Stripes in leather on the sidesLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded collar with a leather lining and a pull loop for optimum fitPadded footbed for all-day comfortMidsoleMoulded midsole detailing for vintage style OutsoleTPR outsole with Vespa monogram graphic grooves for absolute durability, grip and tractionShoe careClean the upper using a suede and nubuck brushDo not store in direct sunlight
